name: @georgedong32/permission-modes
description_en: Claude-Code-style permission modes (ask / plan / auto) for the pi coding agent — with per-mode model profiles, outside-cwd write tracking, and per-mode skill filtering.
description_zh: pi 编码代理的 Claude-Code 式权限模式（询问 / 计划 / 自动）— 具有每模式模型配置文件、cwd 外写入跟踪和每模式技能过滤
